title: Crude oil gains amid a broader rally across risk asset classes
section_path: Crude oil gains amid a broader rally across risk asset classes
section_path_text: Crude oil gains amid a broader rally across risk asset classes
summary:
Main
A risk-on tone across broader financial markets helped push commodity markets higher. Supply side issues also remained in focus. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-08-09 103717.png | assets/2024-08-09_crude-oil-gains-amid-a-broader-rally-across-risk-asset-classes_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_1f0cce6ef112.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil continued it recovery from its recent plunge as elevated geopolitical risks came into focus.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil continued it recovery from its recent plunge as elevated geopolitical risks came into focus. Israel remains on edge as it prepares for a retaliatory attack from Iran following the assassination of Hamas and Hezbollah leaders.
